# Generated by crates/zenmetrics-api/tests/public_api_doc.rs via `cargo public-api --simplified`
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

## all features except _* (314 items)

pub mod ssim2_gpu
pub use ssim2_gpu::Backend
pub use ssim2_gpu::Score
pub mod ssim2_gpu::memory_mode

impl core::marker::Copy for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::Freeze for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::Send for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::Sync for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::Unpin for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
pub enum ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
pub ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode::Full
pub ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode::Strip
pub ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode::Strip::h_body: u32
impl core::clone::Clone for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode::clone(&self) -> ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::cmp::Eq for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode::eq(&self, &ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::marker::Freeze for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::marker::Send for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode
impl core::marker::Sync for ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode

pub const ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::STRIP_HALO_ROWS: u32
pub const ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::STRIP_H_BODY_DEFAULT: u32

pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::estimate_strip_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::live_vram_probe_bytes() -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::reclaim_pooled_vram(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::resolve_auto(u32, u32, usize) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::ResolvedMode>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub enum ssim2_gpu::Error
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::CachedRefNotSupportedInStripMode
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::DimensionMismatch
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::DimensionMismatch::expected: usize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::DimensionMismatch::got: usize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::InvalidBatchSize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::InvalidBatchSize::got: usize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::InvalidBatchSize::max: usize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::InvalidImageSize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::ModeUnsupported(&'static str)
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::NoCachedReference
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::TooBigForFull
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::TooBigForFull::cap: usize
pub ssim2_gpu::Error::TooBigForFull::needed: usize
impl core::clone::Clone for ssim2_gpu::Error
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Error::clone(&self) -> ssim2_gpu::Error

pub struct ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime>
impl<R: cubecl_runtime::runtime::Runtime> ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::blur(&self) -> ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Blur
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_handles_with_mode(&mut self, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Mode, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_linear_nits(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_stripped(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_stripped_with_mode(&mut self, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Mode, &[u8], &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_with_mode(&mut self, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Mode, &[u8], &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_with_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::compute_with_reference_with_mode(&mut self, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Mode, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<ssim2_gpu::GpuSsim2Result>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::dimensions(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::is_strip_mode(&self) -> bool
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::n_scales(&self) -> usize
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::new(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::new_strip(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32, u32) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::new_with_memory_mode(cubecl_runtime::client::ComputeClient<R>, u32, u32, ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::pack_srgb_into_packed_u32_handle(&self, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::scale_dims(&self, usize) -> (u32, u32, usize)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::set_blur(&mut self, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Blur)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::set_reference(&mut self, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<()>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2<R>::with_blur(self, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Blur) -> Self

pub struct ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::compute_handles(&mut self, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle, &cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::compute_linear_nits(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::compute_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::compute_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::dims(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::new(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::new_with_memory_mode(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params, ssim2_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::pack_srgb_into_packed_u32_handle(&self, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<cubecl_runtime::server::handle::Handle>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque::set_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> ssim2_gpu::Result<()>
impl core::marker::Freeze for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl core::marker::Send for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl !core::marker::Sync for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl core::marker::Unpin for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Opaque
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
pub ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params::blur: ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Blur
pub ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params::mode: ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Mode
impl ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
pub const ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params::DEFAULT: Self
impl core::clone::Clone for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params::clone(&self) -> ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::default::Default for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params::default() -> ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::fmt::Debug for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
pub fn ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::marker::Freeze for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::marker::Send for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::marker::Sync for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::marker::Unpin for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Params
pub const ssim2_gpu::NUM_SCALES: usize
pub const ssim2_gpu::SSIM2_FIR_COLUMN_NAME: &str
pub const ssim2_gpu::SSIM2_IIR_COLUMN_NAME: &str
pub const ssim2_gpu::STRIP_HALO_ROWS: u32
pub const ssim2_gpu::STRIP_H_BODY_DEFAULT: u32
pub const fn ssim2_gpu::column_name_for_blur(ssim2_gpu::Ssim2Blur) -> &'static str
pub fn ssim2_gpu::estimate_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> usize
pub fn ssim2_gpu::estimate_strip_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn ssim2_gpu::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub type ssim2_gpu::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, ssim2_gpu::Error>
